whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.body: Yiwu Lafatik Trade Co., Ltd is <highlight>the first trade company</highlight> from Timor-Leste established in China. We specialize in connecting businesses in Timor-Leste with manufacturers and suppliers in China, providing comprehensive logistics and trade solutions.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.body: Trusted by businesses and government agencies across Timor-Leste

globalNetwork.title: Global Network
globalNetwork.body: Strategic presence in both China and Timor-Leste for seamless operations

office.title: Our Office
office.body: We operate from strategic locations in both Yiwu, China, and Dili, Timor-Leste. Our dual presence allows us to provide unparalleled service, understanding both markets deeply and facilitating smooth trade operations between the two nations.
